---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the OpenAgents SDK
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't fully address the problem.

## Scope

Which layer does this belong to?

- [ ] Kernel protocol (`interfaces/`)
- [ ] SDK seam (new or extended plugin role)
- [ ] Builtin plugin implementation
- [ ] CLI tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any examples, references, or prior art that might be relevant.
